claim: No Stable, release, conformance, package-parity, or recorded manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: View mode uses readable text and an Edit button. Edit mode uses a labelled native input or textarea plus Save and Cancel buttons.
semantics.naming: One persistent visible label names the editor. Plain-text labels automatically contextualize the default Edit accessible name; rich labels and repeated custom actions use editAccessibleLabel or a contextual editLabel.
semantics.roleOverride: Consumer role overrides, contenteditable replacements, and action render replacements are outside the supported contract.
semantics.refTarget: HTMLDivElement stable root; editor and action focus are managed internally

interaction.keyboard: Enter saves an input; Control+Enter or Command+Enter saves a textarea; Escape cancels; none run during IME composition. Tab reaches the native editor and visible actions normally.
interaction.pointer: Edit, Save, and Cancel activate on click and retain pointer cancellation before release. Outside blur keeps the draft by default.
interaction.touch: Editor and actions preserve comfortable touch targets and require no gesture.
interaction.speech: Visible action labels remain in their accessible names; consumers provide contextual translated action labels when repeated.
interaction.switchAccess: Native editor and buttons remain separate logical tab stops in DOM order.

focus.entry: Edit moves focus to the native editor after the mode transition.
focus.validationFailure: Synchronous and async failure keep edit mode, retain the draft, and return focus to the editor.
focus.exit: Successful save, unchanged save, and Cancel restore focus to Edit; read-only transition falls back to the programmatically focusable root.
focus.blur: keep-editing is the safe default; explicit save-on-blur uses the same validation, stale, and pending guards.

asyncBehavior: Only one save runs at a time. Save receives an AbortSignal. Reset and unmount abort and invalidate the operation. Controlled external changes block stale local commits. Rejection preserves the draft and exposes a persistent associated error.
formBehavior: A named hidden input serializes the saved value. Disabled omits it; read-only remains successful. Native reset restores an uncontrolled default and exits editing. Required is checked on InlineEdit save because hidden inputs do not participate in browser constraint validation.

states.synchronization: Saved text and hidden form value share committed state; editor text is an isolated draft until one guarded save succeeds.

preferences.enhancedContrast: Uses text, boundaries, native disabled/read-only state, and persistent status rather than color alone.
preferences.forcedColors: Uses Canvas, CanvasText, Field, FieldText, Mark, and native focus indicators.
preferences.reducedMotion: Mode and status transitions are immediate and no focus movement depends on animation.

responsive.overflowPolicy: View columns collapse to one intrinsic column; actions wrap and user text wraps without truncation.

internationalization.imePolicy: Composition start/end are tracked. Enter, Control+Enter, Command+Enter, and Escape do not save or cancel while composition is active.
internationalization.serialization: The saved JavaScript string is submitted unchanged; display and draft preserve Unicode, newlines, bidi content, and grapheme sequences.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide meaningful translated labels, descriptions, validation text, and contextual action labels when instances repeat.
Honor the save AbortSignal before committing an external side effect and make server writes idempotent where retries are possible.
Perform server validation and include Inline Edit failures in the owning form's summary when it participates in a larger submission.
Choose save-on-blur only when an implicit commit is expected and reversible; keep-editing is the safe default.
Do not treat the polite success message as the only persistent workflow outcome.
limitations: Source-present-unreleased records do not include immutable generated artifacts, packed-consumer evidence, package/source parity, or current manual assistive-technology sessions.
A parent form's native constraint validation cannot target the hidden saved-value input; the owning workflow must integrate Inline Edit validation into its persistent summary and server validation.
AbortSignal is cooperative. Consumers must honor it before external persistence; Mergora prevents stale local commits but cannot roll back a remote side effect that ignores cancellation.
